x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: MID Servers are required for AI Agent-triggered discovery, external integrations, and on-premise system connectivity. Missing MID Servers create gaps in AI Agent action coverage for hybrid infrastructure.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Deploy MID Servers for each network zone requiring AI Agent access. Validate MID Servers via ecc_agent_list.do. Upgrade MID Servers to match the instance version. AI Agents fail silently when required MID Servers are unavailable.
